title: helichrysum nudifolium var. pilosellum
intro: Helichrysum nudifolium var. pilosellum, also known as the synoicus or yellow hill daisy, is a perennial herb belonging to the sunflower family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum nudifolium var. pilosellum include reducing inflammation, soothing anxiety and stress, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
